en_title: An Updated Nintendo Switch 2 Screen Has Reportedly Surfaced Online as Fans Hope for Ghosting Issue Fix — But This Isn't the OLED Upgrade We've Been Waiting For
cn_title: 《任天堂》《Nintendo Switch 2》Switch 2新屏曝光，有望解决残影问题
subtitle: 并非OLED，但或许更清晰
opus_summary: 任天堂或为Switch 2换装夏普新LCD，7.9英寸1080p规格不变，旨在改善残影问题，并非OLED。上市时间未定。该主机首年已成美国史上第二畅销硬件，且为任天堂全球最快售出硬件。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo looks set to update the Switch 2's screen, with fans hoping this new display alleviates the console's so-called "ghosting" issues.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂看来准备更新Switch 2的屏幕，玩家们希望这块新屏幕能改善该主机所谓的「残影」问题。

paragraphs.en: Rather than your Switch 2 packing up and never communicating with you again, "ghosting" here refers to image remnants briefly left behind on the console's display, causing a motion blur-like effect. It's an issue reported by some fans since Nintendo's newest console launched last year.
paragraphs.cn: 这里的「残影」并不是指你的Switch 2收拾东西再也不理你，而是指主机的显示屏上短暂留下的图像残留，导致一种类似动态模糊的效果。自任天堂最新主机去年发售以来，已有部分玩家反映过这个问题。

paragraphs.en: Officially, Nintendo is yet to announce any update to the Switch 2's LCD display, though photos of a redesigned screen apparently manufactured by tech company Sharp have now popped up online. In a post on Bluesky, Nintendo Patents Watch states that the new panel initially appeared on a Chinese resale site.
paragraphs.cn: 官方层面，任天堂尚未宣布任何有关Switch 2 LCD屏幕的更新，不过网络上已出现由夏普制造的重新设计屏幕的照片。Nintendo Patents Watch在Bluesky上发帖称，这块新面板最初出现在一个中国二手网站上。

paragraphs.en: Details suggest this display is the same 7.9" size as the Switch 2 launch model, and once again a 1080p-capable LCD screen. So, to be clear, this isn't the eagerly-anticipated OLED upgrade some fans believe is still coming in future .
paragraphs.cn: 细节显示，这块屏幕与Switch 2首发型号同为7.9英寸，并且同样是一块支持1080p的LCD屏幕。所以需要明确的是，这并非部分玩家期待已久的OLED升级——他们仍相信OLED版本会在未来推出。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo raised eyebrows when it failed to go with an OLED display like the one in the most recent Switch 1 model for Switch 2, though defended its decision by pointing to its choice of LCD screen , which it said was of higher quality than the LCD in Switch 1. (Opting for LCD over OLED will also have kept component costs down, at a time that console prices are already skyrocketing .)
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂没有在Switch 2上采用类似最新Switch 1型号所搭载的OLED屏幕，此举曾引发关注，不过公司为自己辩护，称其选择的LCD屏幕质量要高于Switch 1的LCD屏。（在主机售价已大幅上涨的当下，选择LCD而非OLED也有助于压低组件成本。）

paragraphs.en: As Nintendo Patents Watch cautions, it's currently unclear when Switch 2 units with the new screen incorporated will hit shop shelves, or how much of a difference this new display will make. It also remains to be seen whether Nintendo will telegraph this change publicly or make the change silently. Historically, console manufacturers have often swapped out internal components with little fanfare unless there's a significant change to the console's overall form factor, performance or price.
paragraphs.cn: 正如Nintendo Patents Watch提醒的那样，目前尚不清楚搭载新屏幕的Switch 2何时上架，以及新屏幕究竟能带来多大改善。任天堂是会公开宣布这一变更，还是悄悄进行更新，也仍有待观察。从历史经验看，游戏机制造商常常不事声张地更换内部组件，除非主机的整体外观、性能或价格发生重大变化。

paragraphs.en: One possibility here is that this change is being made alongside other alterations to the Switch 2 design required by EU legislation that demands consumers have access to the console's internal battery to enable self-replacement.
paragraphs.cn: 目前的一种可能是，这次屏幕变动与Switch 2为满足欧盟法规要求所做的其他设计改动同步推出——该法规要求消费者必须能接触到主机的内部电池，以便自行更换。

paragraphs.en: The Nintendo Switch 2 just ended its first 12 months on sale as the second fastest-selling hardware in U.S. history, behind only Nintendo's own Game Boy Advance. Globally, Nintendo has said Switch 2 is its fastest-selling hardware ever, boosted by particularly strong sales in the company's homeland of Japan. However, it remains to be seen how the console will fare over the coming year as Nintendo has announced price rises for Switch 2 consoles set to kick in on September 1 in the U.S. and Europe, blaming "changes in market conditions."
paragraphs.cn: Switch 2 刚刚结束了上市首年，已成为美国史上第二畅销硬件，仅次于任天堂自家的 Game Boy Advance。任天堂表示，Switch 2 已成为公司有史以来销售最快的硬件，这得益于其在日本本土的强劲销售。不过，该主机未来一年的表现仍有待观察，因为任天堂已宣布 Switch 2 将于9月1日起在美国和欧洲涨价，并称原因是「市场环境变化」。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips 是 IGN 的新闻编辑。你可以通过 tom_phillips@ign.com 联系 Tom，或在 Bluesky 上找到他。
